name: Holo x86
summary: A real x86 Linux — v86 engine + BIOS + image all verified — booted in a browser tab.

description.p: A real x86 Linux boots in the tab on v86 (a BSD-2-Clause x86-to-wasm JIT). Unlike a serial-only emulator, v86 renders VGA to a canvas with real keyboard + mouse — a graphical machine in the browser, no install, no server.

Every byte is anchored in the κ-substrate: the v86 engine, its wasm core, both BIOSes, and the Linux image are each content-addressed. Their SHA-256 κ is re-derived and gated before execution (Law L5); v86 is handed only verified bytes — so the ENGINE, not just the images, is substrate-native.

ul: Real x86 Linux (Buildroot) on the v86 JIT — graphical VGA, mouse + keyboard
κ-gated engine AND image: bytes admitted by content address, not trust
Swap the image κ-pin to boot a graphical X desktop (Arch/DSL)

releases.description: κ-gated v86 boot of a real x86 Buildroot Linux, rendered to canvas.
